title: Eyes 👀
description: Client-side mod that adds an eye-emoji overlay rendered directly on the player's face
body:
# Created by **fenny (fenny013)**
[![join my tg channel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3dda5aef60f5a12da1753f577f55952cabe61bd9.gif)](https://t.me/fenny0I3)


This is a small client-side cosmetic mod that adds iOS-style meme emoji-eyes directly onto the player's face. The eyes follow head movement and are visible to all players who also have this mod installed.

![00](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86b4a9a64fc2f4e5a93e268c61a95a2c8e495965.png)

<details>
<summary>Replace texture</summary>

To replace the default texture with your own, create a resource pack and override:
```
assets/eyes/textures/gay/eyes.png
```
Just drop your PNG there using the same path.

</details>
